description_long: This helmet features a robust, aerodynamic shell with a striking combination of matte black and deep red surfaces. The upper section is predominantly red with three black horizontal vents at the rear and a central vent at the front, while the lower section is textured black, likely for added grip and impact resistance. Both sides display bold white lightning bolt graphics and embossed text, adding a sporty, aggressive flair. The front is equipped with a clear, full-face visor that offers extensive facial protection, and the chin area is reinforced for safety. Subtle surface scratches and wear marks suggest durability and real-world use. The helmet's overall design is modern, with a focus on both safety and visual appeal, making it suitable for urban motorcycling or similar activities.
description: A modern, red and black full-face helmet with a clear visor, lightning bolt graphics, and multiple ventilation slits. The design is sporty and robust, emphasizing safety and style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clear full-face visor, central vent, and textured black chin guard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white lightning bolt graphic, embossed text, and the transition between red and black surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displays three horizontal black vents on the red surface and 'Sport Outfit' text at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with another lightning bolt graphic and additional embossed markings.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One small horizontal vent at the front center, three horizontal slits at the rear, and subtle vent details on the chin and lower sides.
attribute_graphic_design: Sporty design with white lightning bolt graphics on both sides, embossed text, and three black rear stripes; overall a bold, modern look.
